user_intent_summary: Identify routes with unusually high or low anomaly-related metrics for anomaly detection.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains alarm occurrences and route-level airport codes. Grouping by departure and arrival airports yields route-level aggregates. 'tot' is the count of alarms/events of interest to monitor for anomalies.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset includes alarm flags and route-level airport codes. Filtering for 'allarmati'=1 selects alarmed travelers. Grouping by airports and using 'entrati' (count of travelers) as the metric aligns with anomaly detection on alarmed routes.
